meta.title: the cabin's living room
meta.composer: Marc Ostrom (arranged from Olaf's field recordings, 1979)
meta.for: SlowstockShelf · cabin living-room ambience while browsing the shelf
meta.notes:
The cabin's west-wall shelf sits above Olaf's record player · this loop is what the cabin sounds like when nobody has put a record on. 16 bars at 72 BPM · very quiet. A low room-tone drone, a soft rain overlay (the Oregon coast in the fall), and one distant bell-like soft_sine at bar 9 that could be the cathedral downtown or could be the wind through the porch chime.

Authored to sit UNDER a UI, not above one. Even at full volume it should not compete with a hover chirp.
